title: Convert JSON Array to Text List
cap_description: Convert a JSON array to a list of textable values
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a JSON array of scalar values into a list of textable strings. Use this when a downstream cap expects a plain text list but the upstream produces a JSON array of strings or numbers.

## Inputs

A JSON array of scalar values.

## Outputs

A list of textable values (one per array element).

## Notes

- Non-string elements are converted to their string representations.
- For the reverse, use [Convert Text List to JSON Array](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;textable").
